# DreamBeesAI

> The professional platform for high-performance generative art.

DreamBeesAI is an advanced AI image generation studio powered by dedicated H100 GPU clusters. We provide sub-second inference using state-of-the-art open-source models like Stable Diffusion XL (SDXL) and Flux Pro.

## Core Capabilities
- **Text-to-Image Generation:** High-fidelity image synthesis from natural language prompts.
- **Model Selection:** Access to multiple fine-tuned models (SDXL, Flux, Anime, Photorealistic).
- **In-Painting/Out-Painting:** (Coming Soon) Advanced editing capabilities.
- **Gallery:** A community showcase of generated artwork.

## Key Links
- **Home:** https://dreambeesai.com/
- **Studio (Generate):** https://dreambeesai.com/generate
- **Model Catalog:** https://dreambeesai.com/models
- **Gallery:** https://dreambeesai.com/gallery
- **Pricing:** https://dreambeesai.com/pricing
- **Blog:** https://dreambeesai.com/blog

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend:** React, Vite
- **Backend:** Firebase (Cloud Functions, Firestore)
- **Inference:** H100 GPU Clusters via external API

## Contact
- For support or inquiries, visit https://dreambeesai.com/contact
